channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What will Trump do next with Iran?
item.description: Three months into the Iran conflict, the Trump administration wavers between threats of strikes and diplomatic overtures.

item.title: Kyle Busch died after severe pneumonia progressed into sepsis, his family says
item.description: The two-time NASCAR champion died Thursday, a day after collapsing in a Chevrolet simulator.

item.title: A Pakistani-American musician blends country and Desi styles
item.description: On May 31, Mo Sabri performs with the Nashville Symphony in an orchestral version of his album "Tennessee Desi."

item.title: US reroutes passengers from Ebola-affected countries
item.description: The US government imposes travel restrictions on American citizens and permanent residents departing Ebola-affected countries.
